trait.name: Evasion
entries: If Bumbles makes a DEX save to take half damage, it takes 0 on a success and half on a failure[cite: 1940, 1941].

trait.name: Homunculus Nature
entries: Shares Grumbles' initiative count but takes its turn immediately after[cite: 1945].
It only takes the Dodge action unless Grumbles uses a Bonus Action to command it[cite: 1946].

action.name: Force Strike
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 5} to hit, range 9 m, one target. {@h}4 (1d4 + 2) force damage[cite: 1881].

reaction.name: Channel Magic
entries: When Grumbles casts a 'Touch' spell, Bumbles can deliver it if it is within 36 m (120 ft) of Grumbles.

trait.name: Apex Reflexes
entries: When Ivy succeeds on a DEX save to take half damage, she takes 0 instead. On a failure, she takes the full amount[cite: 2606, 2607].

trait.name: Bee Nature
entries: Shares Nisha's initiative count but takes its turn immediately after[cite: 2604].
Takes the Dodge action unless Nisha uses a Bonus Action to command it[cite: 2605].

action.name: Nature's Stinger
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 1.5 m, one target. {@h}5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage[cite: 2608].

action.name: Distract
entries: Nisha uses a Bonus Action to have Ivy buzz in a creature's face. The next attack roll against that creature has Advantage.
